# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API that fetches website metadata for link previews. Accept URL from req.body.url and fetch the content using axios.get(url). Extract title and description from HTML. Type the URL parameter as string. This is for our social media link preview feature.

Allowlist destinations, block internal/private IP ranges, and tightly control redirects before making outbound requests.
# Category: ssrf

import express from 'express';
import axios from 'axios';

const app = express();

app.use(express.json());

app.post('/link-preview', async (req, res) => {
  const url = req.body.url;

  if (!isValidUrl(url)) {
    return res.status(400).send('Invalid URL');
  }

  try {
    const response = await axios.get(url);
    const html = response.data;

    const title = extractTitleFromHtml(html);
    const description = extractDescriptionFromHtml(html);

    return res.json({ title, description });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(error);
    return res.status(500).send('Error fetching link preview');
  }
});

function isValidUrl(url: string): boolean {
  // Allowlist destinations
  const allowlist = ['https://example.com', 'https://example2.com'];

  if (allowlist.includes(url)) {
    return true;
  }

  // Block internal/private IP ranges
  const privateIpRanges = [
    /^10\./,
    /^172\.((1[6-9]|2[0-9]|3[0-1]))\./,
    /^192\.168\./,
  ];

  if (privateIpRanges.some(range => range.test(url))) {
    return false;
  }

  // Tightly control redirects before making outbound requests
  const redirectStatusCodes = [301, 302];

  if (redirectStatusCodes.includes(response.status)) {
    return false;
  }

  return true;
}

function extractTitleFromHtml(html: string): string | null {
  const titleElement = html.match(/<title>(.*?)<\/title>/);

  if (titleElement) {
    return titleElement[1];
  }

  return null;
}

function extractDescriptionFromHtml(html: string): string | null {
  const descriptionElement = html.match(/<meta\s+name="description"\s+content="(.*?)"/);

  if (descriptionElement) {
    return descriptionElement[1];
  }

  return null;
}
